name: dataflou-compositor
description: OSC + MIDI scene compositor - v0.6.2 fixes a macOS crash on quit/window-close (the engine tick sent IPC to a destroyed window; sends are now guarded with isDestroyed + mainWindow nulled on close). v0.6.1 hardening pass (full-app audit: OSC listener survives malformed packets, State-Trigger notes never hang, recorded Gesture/Attractor/distribution + MIDI note windows no longer laundered on load, MIDI port auto-recovers on reconnect, macOS reopen keeps the engine live, conditioning robustness + leak caps, dead-code removal). Input Conditioning (per-Instrument + per-Parameter smoothing chain on the Hardware-Mode input stream: 1 Euro filter, EMA smooth, median, slew limit, deadband, auto-range; each stage address-targeted; editable from the Instrument OR the Parameter inspector with a live raw-vs-conditioned scope - resizable, editable time/value axes, saved per Parameter with the session), State Triggers (Wekinator-lite pose/state detectors on the incoming stream: explicit Rules or Learn-by-demonstration centroid+variance model, Enter+Exit / One-shot / Continuous match-to-CC modes, dwell + hysteresis debouncing, fire MIDI notes/CCs and/or dataFLOU scenes), per-Parameter Hardware input scaling (device range to output range before the catch comparison, invertible), live per-Parameter red-dot readout of the incoming (or scaled) hardware value on each track; Session-wide OSC routing (broadcast destination + listener port in the prefs toolbar, syncs to Pool Network), Instrument-wide OSC port broadcast (flip an entire Instrument's port across template + every row + every clip in one click - two-controller live swap), Hardware Mode Forward-suppress diagnostic panel (per-source received / suppressed / forwarded counters), right-click rebind every HW-Moded Instrument to one device, window title shows version + session name, separate saveable toolbar zoom + Ctrl+= / Ctrl+- / Ctrl+0 UI zoom shortcuts, narrower scene title row, horizontal scroll-wheel support; Generative Scene Sequencer (one-button shuffle the scene timeline, 4 presets - Random / Drift / Surprise / Shuffle, bipolar Affinity slider biases toward similar/dissimilar scenes via auto-computed multi-arg scene similarity, per-scene Weight 1-10 + Random Weights button, pool source All / Timeline only with per-scene checklist, min/max scene duration, Use Morph for gliding transitions, 7 MIDI-learnable controls), per-track Default Transition broadcast in the Parameter Inspector, Cell Inspector Transition tooltip, Modulation 2 -> Sequencer (Rate->bpm, Shape->per-mode personality knob, Depth->genAmount generative wildness), drop-focus fixes in Inspector inputs, Hardware Mode session persistence, Modulation 1 relabel, Gesture modulator (XY recorder with live crayon + animated playhead, Wiggle, Forward / Backward / Ping-Pong playback), Stage-2 Address sub-mode, every modulator type usable as Modulation 2, Two-stage modulator with live overlay, Strange Attractor modulator (Lorenz / Aizawa / Thomas / Rössler / Rössler-4D / Lü-4D), Address sequencer mode, Scaling PRE/POST switch, editable pinned values broadcast to clips, per-slot Delay + Variation, Distribution knob on Random + S&H, Hardware Mode (catch-mode soft-takeover from physical controllers), per-sequence-slot duration / follow-action overrides, velocity humanize, modulator-driven note-edge MIDI retrigger, Learned MIDI panel with inline binding editor, drag-reorder scenes, configurable MIDI note window, pitch-snap with 26 scales, native MIDI output, Capture, OSC fan-out forward, per-arg pin + per-arg scaling, undo/redo, save-on-quit, per-session GUI layout, Pool + Scene libraries, 10 sequencer modes, generative system, 10 modulators, rich themes
author: Vincent Fillion
